summary: Live PR inventory shard classified from the hydrated preflight artifact and deterministic validation repair. No shared canonical was inferred. No close, merge, or fix action is allowed or safe here; security-sensitive open PRs #84485 and #88992 are routed to central security handling, and maintainer/product decisions remain scoped to the specific non-security open items that need them.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent PR; proof failure blocks any stronger automated conclusion.
Maintainer technical review is required; merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Validator-reported security-sensitive PR must be quarantined to central security handling; ProjectClownfish should not mutate it.
Author follow-up and unresolved automated review findings require human/author resolution; close and fix paths are disabled.
Focused bug-fix correctness and failing branch checks require maintainer/author resolution outside this close-only inventory job.
Open product/maintainer decision remains for the linked issue; no fix PR or close action is allowed.
Security-sensitive linked PR must be quarantined to central security handling; ProjectClownfish should not mutate it.
